title: July 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 23''' is the 204th day (205th in leap years) of the year, with 161 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#197|1947]] – [[John Dicks]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Gavin Bocquet]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Woody Harrelson]] is born.
*1961 – [[David Kaufman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Shawn Levy]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Orli Shoshan]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[Tosin Cole]] is born.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Battle of the Bounty Hunters]]'' published.
*[[1997]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 2]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 10|''Empire'' 10]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Legacy (2006) 26|''Legacy'' (2006) 26]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 31|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 31]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars Insider 143|''Star Wars Insider'' 143]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Legacy (2013) 17|''Legacy'' (2013) 17]] published.
*2014 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 29|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' Part 29]] published.
*[[2017]] – "[[Beasts of Echo Base]]" first airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*2017 – "[[The Imposter Inside]]" first airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2019]] – ''[[Thrawn: Treason]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Infested]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – ''[[Young Jedi Adventures: The Charhound Chase]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent 2|''Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent'' 2]] published.
